debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ D < @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

failed_attempts:
by
  refine' lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') fun h_eq => _
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_mem : N ∈ D := hN
  have h_ref : D ≤ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion₂]
    exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
  have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
  have h_sSup_eq' : sSup (B N hN) = sSup {N} := by
    rw [← h_sSup_eq, Set.sSup_singleton]
  have h_eq_set : B N hN = {N} := by
    apply sSup_indep_eq_singleton
    · exact hB' N hN
    · exact hB'' N hN
    · exact Set.sSup_singleton_indep
    · exact h_sSup_eq'
  exact h_ne h_eq_set

  have h_B_eq : B N hN = {N} := by

by
  have h_le : D ≤ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  refine ⟨h_le, ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_ref : IsRefinement (refinement B hB hB' hB'') D := h_le
  have h_sub : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
  have h_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ B N hN := hB'' N hN
  have h_mem : N ∈ D := hN
  have h_cover : ∀ p ∈ B N hN, ∃ A : D, p ≤ A.val := by
    intro p hp
    exact (RefinementMapSurj' D (refinement B hB hB' hB'') h_ref) ⟨p, ?_⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop, and_true]
    exact ⟨N, hN, hp⟩
  have h_unique : B N hN = {N} := by
    apply Set.ext
    intro p
    constructor
    · intro hp
      rcases h_cover p hp with ⟨A, h_le_A⟩
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · exact le_sSup_of_le h_mem h_le_A
        · have h_A_in_D : A.val ∈ D := A.prop
          have h_disj : Disjoint A.val (sSup (D \ {A.val})) := by
            apply D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_of_mem
            exact A.prop
          have h_sum : sSup D = A.val ⊔ sSup (D \ {A.val}) := by
            rw [sSup_insert, sSup_singleton]
            congr
            ext x
            simp
          rw [D.sSup_eq_top, h_sum] at *
          have h_p_le_A : p ≤ A.val := h_le_A
          have h_p_le_N : p ≤ N := by
            rw [← h_sub]
            apply le_sSup hp
          have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
            rw [← h_sub]
            apply sSup_le
            intro q hq
            rcases h_cover q hq with ⟨A', h_le_A'⟩
            exact le_trans h_le_A' (le_sSup_of_le h_mem (by aesop))
          exact h_A_le_N
      rw [h_A_eq_N]
      exact Set.mem_singleton.mpr (le_antisymm h_le_A (by rw [h_A_eq_N]; apply le_rfl))
    · intro h_p
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton] at h_p
      rw [h_p]
      have h_N_in_B : N ∈ B N hN := by
        rw [← h_sub]
        apply le_sSup_iff.mpr
        intro p hp
        exact le_rfl
      exact h_N_in_B
  contradiction

by
  refine' lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') fun h_eq => _
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_mem : N ∈ D := hN
  have h_ref : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
  have h_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ B N hN := hB'' N hN
  rw [← h_ref] at h_ne
  simp only [Set.ext_iff] at h_ne
  push_neg at h_ne
  rcases h_ne with ⟨M', hM'⟩
  cases' hM' with hM'_in hM'_not_in
  · have hM'_le : M' ≤ N := le_sSup hM'_in
    have hM'_ne_bot : M' ≠ ⊥ := fun h => h_not_bot (h ▸ hM'_in)
    have h_disj : Disjoint M' (sSup (B N hN \ {M'})) :=
      sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup h_indep hM'_in (by simp [hM'_not_in])
    have h_sum : sSup (B N hN) = M' ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {M'}) :=
      by rw [sSup_insert_eq, Set.insert_eq_of_mem hM'_in]; rfl
    rw [h_sum] at h_ref
    have h_eq' : M' = N := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · exact hM'_le
      · rw [h_ref]
        apply le_sup_left
    rw [h_eq'] at hM'_not_in
    simp at hM'_not_in
  · have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ {N} := by
      intro M' hM'
      have hM'_le : M' ≤ N := le_sSup hM'
      have hM'_ne_bot : M' ≠ ⊥ := fun h => h_not_bot (h ▸ hM')
      have h_disj : Disjoint M' (sSup (B N hN \ {M'})) :=
        sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup h_indep hM' (by simp [hM'_not_in])
      have h_sum : sSup (B N hN) = M' ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {M'}) :=
        by rw [sSup_insert_eq, Set.insert_eq_of_mem hM']; rfl
      rw [h_ref, h_sum] at *
      have h_eq' : M' = N := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · exact hM'_le
        · rw [h_ref]
          apply le_sup_left
      simp [h_eq']
    have h_eq_set : B N hN = {N} := by
      ext M'
      constructor
      · intro hM'
        exact h_sub hM'
      · intro hM'
        simp at hM'
        rw [hM']
        have hN_in : N ∈ B N hN := by
          rw [h_ref]
          apply le_sSup_iff.mpr
          use N
          simp
        exact hN_in
    contradiction

  have h_le : D ≤ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  refine ⟨h_le, ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro x hx
    rw [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion]
    exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
  have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
  have h_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ B N hN := hB'' N hN
  have h_ref_carrier : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = ⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN := rfl
  rw [← h_sSup_eq] at h_eq
  simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
  have h_singleton : B N hN = {N} := by
    apply Set.eq_singleton_of_subset_of_card_le
    · intro x hx
      have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := le_sSup_of_mem hx
      have h_N_le_x : N ≤ x := by
        rw [← h_sSup_eq]
        apply le_sSup hx
      exact le_antisymm h_N_le_x h_x_le_N
    · have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
        intro h_empty
        rw [h_empty, sSup_empty] at h_sSup_eq
        exact (D.not_bot_mem hN) (h_sSup_eq.symm ▸ rfl)
      exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _)
  exact h_ne h_singleton

    apply le_antisymm

      have h_ge : N ≤ x := by
        rw [← h_sSup_eq']
        apply le_sSup
        simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        exact rfl
      exact (le_antisymm h_ge h_le) ▸ Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr rfl
    · intro x hx
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
      rw [hx]
      have h_mem : N ∈ B N hN := by
        rw [← h_sSup_eq]
        apply le_sSup_iff.mpr
        intro y hy
        have h_le : y ≤ N := by rw [← h_sSup_eq]; apply le_sSup hy
        exact h_le
      exact h_mem

  refine' lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') fun h_eq => _

      Set.mem_setOf_eq, and_true, exists_and_right, Subtype.exists]
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    exact hM'
  have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
  have h_sSup_eq' : sSup (B N hN) = sSup {N} := by
    rw [← h_eq, SetLike.ext_iff] at h_sub
    have h_subset : B N hN ⊆ {N} := by
      intro x hx
      have h_x_in_D : x ∈ D := h_sub hx
      have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := le_sSup_of_mem hN (by simp [hx])
      have h_N_le_x : N ≤ x := by
        have h_x_in_ref : x ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
          simp [refinement, hx]
        have h_ref_eq_D : refinement B hB hB' hB'' = D := h_eq.symm ▸ rfl
        rw [h_ref_eq_D] at h_x_in_ref
        have h_x_ge_N : N ≤ x := by
          apply le_sSup
          simp [h_x_in_ref]
        exact h_x_ge_N
      exact le_antisymm h_x_le_N h_N_le_x
    have h_eq_set : B N hN = {N} := by
      ext x
      constructor
      · intro hx
        exact h_subset hx
      · intro hx
        simp at hx
        rw [hx]
        have h_N_in_B : N ∈ B N hN := by
          rw [← h_sSup_eq]
          apply le_sSup
          simp
        exact h_N_in_B
    rw [h_eq_set]
  simp at h_sSup_eq'
  contradiction

by
  have h_le : D ≤ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  refine ⟨h_le, ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_ref : IsRefinement (refinement B hB hB' hB'') D := h_le
  have h_mem : N ∈ D := hN
  rcases h_ref h_mem with ⟨C, hC_sub, hC_eq⟩
  have h_carrier_eq : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = ⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN := rfl
  have h_C_eq : C = B N hN := by
    ext x
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor
    · intro hx
      rcases hx with ⟨M', hM', hx'⟩
      rcases hM' with ⟨M'', hM'', hx''⟩
      subst_vars
      aesop
    · intro hx
      use N, hN, hx
  rw [h_C_eq] at hC_eq
  have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
  rw [h_sSup_eq] at hC_eq
  have h_singleton : B N hN = {N} := by
    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have h_le_x : x ≤ N := le_sSup hx
      have h_ge_x : N ≤ x := by
        rw [← hC_eq]
        apply le_sSup
        simp only [h_C_eq, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop, and_imp, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
        use N, hN, hx
      exact le_antisymm h_ge_x h_le_x
    · intro hx
      rw [hx]
      have h_nonempty : B N hN ≠ ∅ := by
        intro h_empty
        rw [h_empty] at h_ne
        simp at h_ne
      exact Set.nonempty_of_ne_empty h_nonempty
  contradiction

by
  refine' ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', _⟩
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_mem : N ∈ D := hN
  have h_ref : D ≤ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro x hx
    rw [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion]
    exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
  have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
  have h_inj : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = ⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN := rfl
  rw [← h_sSup_eq] at h_sub
  have h_contra : B N hN = {N} := by
    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    simp
    intro hx
    have h_x_in_D : x ∈ D := by
      rw [h_inj] at *
      simp at *
      aesop
    have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := le_sSup hx
    have h_N_le_x : N ≤ x := by
      have h_x_in_ref : x ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
        rw [h_inj]
        simp
        aesop
      have h_ref_eq : D = refinement B hB hB' hB'' := h_eq
      rw [h_ref_eq] at h_x_in_D
      have h_x_eq_N : x = N := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · exact h_x_le_N
        · have h_N_in_ref : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
            rw [h_inj]
            simp
            aesop
          have h_disj : Disjoint x N := by
            apply (refinement B hB hB' hB'').sSupIndep.disjoint_of_ne
            · exact h_x_in_ref
            · exact h_N_in_ref
            · intro h_eq
              rw [h_eq] at hx
              simp at hx
              aesop
          have h_N_le_x : N ≤ x := by
            apply le_of_disjoint_sup_eq_top
            · exact h_disj
            · rw [← h_sSup_eq]
              apply sSup_le
              intro y hy
              have h_y_in_ref : y ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
                rw [h_inj]
                simp
                aesop
              have h_y_eq_N : y = N := by
                apply le_antisymm
                · exact le_sSup hy
                · have h_N_in_ref : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
                    rw [h_inj]
                    simp
                    aesop
                  have h_disj : Disjoint y N := by
                    apply (refinement B hB hB' hB'').sSupIndep.disjoint_of_ne
                    · exact h_y_in_ref
                    · exact h_N_in_ref
                    · intro h_eq
                      rw [h_eq] at hy
                      simp at hy
                      aesop
                  have h_N_le_y : N ≤ y := by
                    apply le_of_disjoint_sup_eq_top
                    · exact h_disj
                    · rw [← h_sSup_eq]
                      apply sSup_le
                      intro z hz
                      simp at hz
                      aesop
                  exact h_N_le_y
              rw [h_y_eq_N]
              exact le_rfl
          exact h_N_le_x
      exact h_x_eq_N
    exact h_x_eq_N
  contradiction

by
  refine' lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') fun h => _
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hBN⟩
  have h1 : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro x hx
    rw [Set.mem_iUnion]
    exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
  have h2 : D.carrier ⊆ B N hN := by
    intro x hx
    rw [← h] at hx
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨M', hM', x_in_B⟩
    have h_eq : M' = N := by
      have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B M' hM') = sSup (B N hN) := by
        rw [hB M' hM', hB N hN]
        exact (sSup_induced_eq_of_subset D.sSupIndep' h1 h2).symm
      sorry
    subst h_eq
    exact x_in_B
  have h3 : B N hN = {N} := by
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have h4 : x ≤ N := le_sSup hx
      have h5 : N ≤ x := by
        have h6 : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
        rw [h6]
        apply le_sSup hx
      exact le_antisymm h5 h4
    · intro hx
      rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
      rw [hx]
      have h7 : N ∈ B N hN := by
        have h8 : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
        have h9 : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
        have h10 : ⊥ ∉ B N hN := hB'' N hN
        exact sSupIndep.mem_of_eq_top h9 h8 h10
      exact h7
  contradiction
